title: Looking for Teacher at ICAT Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at ICAT Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? ICAT Holdings Services in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ICAT Holdings Services:
ICAT Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICAT Holdings Services!
